## Findings worth surfacing before Stage 5

| # | Finding | Severity | Carry to |
|---|---------|----------|----------|
| 1 | Subtitle token `#908d8d` on white gives 4.0:1 contrast — **fails WCAG AA for body text** | **MEDIUM** | Stage 8 Functional Design (proposed fix: darken to `#737272`) |
| 2 | User opted-IN to PBT (A3=A) — adds property-based test files for password-hash, JWT, normalization, refresh rotation | INFO | Stage 12 Codegen plan; Stage 13 Code Review |
| 3 | Refresh-token rotation invariant (NFR-T02d) implies an additional `refresh_tokens` table with `family_id` and `rotated_at` | INFO | Stage 8 Functional Design — domain entities |
| 4 | Account-enumeration safety (NFR-S09) requires identical-shape responses for signup-duplicate and login-fail — must be tested explicitly | INFO | Stage 13 Code Review (paired-response test) |
| 5 | `/.well-known/jwks.json` endpoint introduces a key-rotation discussion — out-of-scope for v1 (single static key pair is fine), but flagged for NFR Design | INFO | Stage 10 NFR Design |
